description_long: This is a large, rectangular, soft-sided bag with a gusseted base, designed for holding cat litter. The front features a prominent image of a cat's face, eco-friendly icons, and branding in both English and Russian, with a green and beige color palette. The back displays detailed product information, usage instructions, and additional branding, all printed on a matte surface. Both side panels are narrow and display the product name, 'Silitter', and the volume '15L' in bold white text on a beige background. The bag appears to be made of a flexible, laminated plastic material, likely with a foil or paper layer for added strength and barrier properties. The top is sealed, with no visible spout or cap, indicating a tear-open or cut-to-open design. The overall appearance is clean, undamaged, and professionally printed, suitable for retail environments.
description: A large, soft-sided, rectangular bag of cat litter with green and beige branding, featuring a cat image and eco-friendly icons. The bag is made of flexible plastic and holds 15 liters.
description_view_0: Narrow side view showing the beige panel with 'Silitter', 'CAT LITTER', and '15L' text.
description_view_1: Back view displaying detailed product information, instructions, and branding on a green and beige background.
description_view_2: Opposite narrow side view, nearly identical to view 0, with the same text and design.
description_view_3: Front view featuring a large cat face, 'Silitter' branding, eco-friendly icons, and the '15L' volume prominently displayed.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front and back display 'Silitter' branding in stylized script, with additional Russian text, eco-friendly icons, a large cat face image, and '15L' volume marking. The back has detailed product information and instructions in a clean, organized layout.
